what_it_does: Records metadata for a channel attachment (att-58051ed5) that links a board item (item-11da929d) in the dragnet-development channel.
observations: The file contains only YAML frontmatter and no body content.
It declares an attachment_type of board_items with a target of board://item-11da929d.
It is scoped to the dragnet-development channel.
It includes an ISO 8601 added timestamp.
standouts: The target is expressed as a board:// URI.
The attachment_type is board_items, suggesting a category of board-related attachments.
conventions: Uses YAML frontmatter with id, channel, attachment_type, target, and added fields.
The filename matches the attachment id.
References an external target via a custom URI scheme.
concerns: No descriptive content explains what the attachment represents.
The board:// URI cannot be resolved from this file alone.
notes: A minimal channel-attachment ledger stub that points a dragnet-development attachment at a board item.
questions: What artifact or content does board://item-11da929d denote?
Is board_items a type label or a collection name?
Which system consumes this attachment metadata?
purpose_vs_actual: The frontmatter states it is a board_items attachment targeting a board item, and the file does exactly that; no mismatch.
intention_signals: It appears intended to register a persistent attachment record that associates a channel memory item with a specific board item for later retrieval or fusion.
contribution: Provides a stable, timestamped identity and target pointer for a channel attachment, enabling a fused system to locate and relate this attachment to its board item without ambiguity.
summary_for_embedding: A YAML-frontmatter channel attachment record linking attachment att-58051ed5 in dragnet-development to board item item-11da929d via a board:// URI.
intention_for_embedding: To register a board-item attachment in channel memory with a stable id, channel, type, target, and creation timestamp.
